steps.heading: Link and capture once
steps.body: Drag from your starting tower to a neutral tower. Packets keep sending while the link stays active. You win when that neutral tower becomes yours.
goals: Action: Create one outgoing link from your starting tower.
Debrief: You won because you captured the required tower.

tutorials.title: T02 - Hold More Towers Than the Enemy

steps.heading: Expand for ownership advantage
steps.body: Capture nearby towers quickly. Owning more towers gives you stronger total regeneration and map control. You win once you hold 3 towers at the same time.
goals: Action: Keep capturing instead of turtling on one tower.
Debrief: You won by reaching the visible tower-count target.

steps.heading: Stage from the middle
steps.body: Long routes arrive too late. Capture the middle tower first, then attack the far tower from that forward position. You win after the far tower falls.
goals: Objective: Capture the far tower by first taking the middle tower.
Action: Route your packets through the forward tower.
Debrief: You won by using shorter travel time to secure the far objective.

steps.heading: Defend two towers with reserve troops
steps.body: Do not empty both towers at once. Keep reserve packets ready so you can reinforce whichever lane gets hit first. You win by defending both towers for the full defense timer.
goals: Objective: Defend both friendly towers for 45 seconds.
Action: Keep one tower stocked for emergency reinforcement.
Debrief: You won by preventing either tower from falling during the defense window.

steps.heading: Intercept before snowball
steps.body: Swarm enemies become dangerous when they stack. Intercept them on the outer approach lane instead of waiting near your inner tower. You win by clearing the wave before it reaches the inner tower.
goals: Objective: Destroy the swarm wave before it reaches the inner tower.
Action: Send packets early to the interception point.
Debrief: You won by stopping the snowball before it formed.

steps.heading: Prioritize the tank threat
steps.body: The tank absorbs damage and anchors the enemy push. Collapse multiple links on the tank first, then turn that advantage into a base capture. You win after the tank wave is defeated and the enemy base is captured.
goals: Objective: Defeat the tank wave, then capture the enemy base.
Action: Focus-fire the heavy unit before splitting pressure.
Debrief: You won by prioritizing the highest threat target.
